name: Basic Cooked Rice
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 tbsp Bell peppers - chopped very fine
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 5x9x2-1/2-inch loaf pan, combine all ingredients.
2. Mix well.
3. Seal the pan tightly with aluminum foil.
4. Bake at 350°F until rice is tender, about 1 hour and 10 minutes.
5. Serve immediately. However, you can count on the rice staying hot for 45 minutes and warm for 2 hours.
6. To reheat leftover rice, either use a double boiler or warm the rice in a skillet with unsalted butter.
